visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit warehouse store setting. Two young women are the central focus, standing side-by-side. The woman on the left wears a black-and-white patterned bucket hat and a white sleeveless top, while the woman on the right wears a black beret and a dark long-sleeved top. They are holding three large, soft animal-shaped pillows: a white bear, a pink hippo, and a white crocodile. They smile warmly and look directly at the camera. (2) The camera maintains a medium shot as the women interact with the pillows, hugging them and showing the fabric's quilted texture. The background is filled with high industrial shelving units stacked with boxes and household goods, with a few other shoppers visible in the distance. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail environment. (3) The women continue to showcase the pillows, at one point playfully using the crocodile pillow in a gentle swinging motion. They emphasize the size of the objects, which appear to be about arm-length. The video concludes with them posing together with the pillows, maintaining a cheerful and inviting expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 鱷魚 超好看. [Variety]: 最便宜的動物涼感抱枕. (2) [Subtitle]: 最新出的動物造型 好可愛喲. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個只要439元. (4) [Subtitle]: 有粉紅色的河馬. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後白色的熊. (6) [Subtitle]: 綠色的鱷魚 推薦鱷魚 鱷魚好可愛. (7) [Subtitle]: 好好看 然後它做的這個格紋. (8) [Subtitle]: 摸起來就很舒服 那個抱起來冰冰涼. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的高度是60公分. (10) [Subtitle]: 我覺得大人小孩都還不錯. (11) [Slogan]: 真的必收!. [Subtitle]: 主要是圖案真的很可愛 而且價格真的很划算. (12) [Subtitle]: 還可以拿來這樣毆打你. (13) [Subtitle]: 我有2隻.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 2 distant shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a bucket hat, white top, and jeans; the other wears a black beret and a black top with cut-outs.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior featuring high-reach pallet racking, industrial shelving, and wide aisles with shoppers and carts.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic, up-tempo electronic pop music bed featuring a bright synthesizer melody and a steady 4/4 drum beat. A female narrator speaks with high arousal and a cheerful tone, introducing a product. (2) A clear 'ding' sound effect highlights the transition as the narrator begins listing different variations of the animal pillows. The speech rate is brisk and enthusiastic, maintaining a high pitch level throughout. (3) The background music remains consistent as the narrator details specific features like price and size. The voice exhibits complex intonation with a notable rising ratio, suggesting excitement and engagement. (4) A final phase features a more playful vocal delivery with a light laugh-like quality as the narrator finishes the description. The music reaches a sharp hard cut at the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Specific Feature Breakdown -> Price Analysis -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional showcase for a specific line of animal-themed cooling pillows available at Costco. By using high-energy hosts and upbeat music, it highlights the product's affordability, physical dimensions, and 'cute' aesthetic to drive consumer interest and store visits.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the retailer (Costco), clear display of the product price, and an enthusiastic recommendation of the items.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced social media promotional clip utilizing high-energy vocal delivery and bold on-screen text to market warehouse store finds.
